channel.title: Api-Security on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Api-Security on Pi Stack

item.title: Nginx vs Caddy vs Envoy Ratelimit: Best Self-Hosted Rate Limiting Solutions 2026
item.description: Rate limiting is a fundamental defense mechanism for any service exposed to the internet. It protects your infrastructure from abuse, prevents resource exhaustion, and ensures fair access for all users. Whether you are running a public API, a web application, or a microservices architecture, implementing effective rate limiting is not optional — it is essential.
